queries.question: Provide a list of all chefs and also provide a list of servers who speak English.
queries.sql:
SELECT Staff.Name 
FROM Staff
WHERE Staff.Role = "Chef" OR Staff.Role = "Server" AND Staff.Language = "English"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?staff a :Staff .
  ?staff p:name ?name .
  ?staff p:Role ?role_w .
  ?staff p:Role ?role_w2 .
  ?staff p:Language ?language_w .
  FILTER((STR(?role_w) = "Chef" || (STR(?role_w2) = "Server" && STR(?language_w) = "English")))
}

queries.question: Show me chefs and servers who speak English.
queries.sql:
SELECT Staff.Name 
FROM Staff
WHERE (Staff.Role = "Chef" OR Staff.Role = "Server") AND Staff.Language = "English"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?staff a :Staff .
  ?staff p:name ?name .
  ?staff p:Role ?role_w .
  ?staff p:Role ?role_w2 .
  ?staff p:Language ?language_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?role_w) = "Chef" || STR(?role_w2) = "Server")) && STR(?language_w) = "English"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me chefs and servers who speak English.
